title: Mega Menu Nav
description: Main mega menu navigation links. Contrast text with semibold weight, hover and focus states change to primary color.

styles.css: & a{transition: color 200ms ease;} & a:hover{color: var(--wp--preset--color--primary); text-decoration: none;} & a:active{color: var(--wp--preset--color--primary); text-decoration: underline;} & a:focus-visible{color: var(--wp--preset--color--primary); outline: 2px solid var(--wp--preset--color--primary); outline-offset: 2px;}
